stages.name: PDF reality
stages.source: Visible invoice row: QUANT=1,000 · CXs=0 · UNI · P.VENDA S/IVA=7,967 EUR · DESC blank · VALOR LÍQUIDO=7,97 EUR · IVA 6% (.tmp/geometry-audit/images/f0aa5a08-86a3-4938-99f0-711e86073968.png)

stages.name: OCR / table GPT raw (Pass C era, cropped table)
bindMonetaryColumns input
stages.source: Same as Hybrid H legacy fields; replayed via production bindMonetaryColumns(parseMonetaryLineItems(...))

stages.name: bindMonetaryColumns output
stages.note: Rule B / total÷qty collapse: 7.97÷2=3.985→3.99. Mathematically consistent with qty=2 fiction; unit_price now also differs from PDF gross 7.967.
stages.source: Production replay 2026-06-21; corroborated .tmp/phase1-validation-forensics-result.json ricotta.db.replay.bound; .tmp/family-a-v25-raw-capture/edge-invoke-final.json (deploy v36 post-bind unit_price=3.99)

stages.source: Post-bind monetary line mapped to InvoiceLineItem

stages.name: reconcileLineItemAmounts output
stages.source: Production replay 2026-06-21; .tmp/persistence-audit/reconcile-trace.json has no Ricotta row (Bocconcino pomodor only)

stages.name: invoice_items persisted (VL DB)
stages.note: Stores pre-bind unit_price (7.967→7.97), not post-bind 3.99. qty×unit_price≠total (2×7.97=15.94≠7.97).

stages.name: Operational cost calculation
stages.expression: 7.97 total ÷ 3 kg usable (2 un × 1.5 kg from name)

priorStagesCorrect: Pass C era OCR/table GPT qty=1 (.tmp/bocconcino-investigation/extract-invoice-response.json)

downstreamConsistency.bindMonetaryColumns: Given qty=2 and total=7.97, derives unit_price=3.99 (internally consistent; does not restore PDF qty=1)
downstreamConsistency.costAndUI: All downstream stages derive economics from bound qty=2; math self-consistent (€3.99×2≈€7.97; €2.66/kg=€7.97÷3kg) but anchored to wrong quantity

uiVerdict.classificationCaveat: UI audit used bound qty=2 × €3.99 as 'invoice reality'; true PDF shows qty=1 × €7.967. Against PDF, UI Last Purchase (2 un), procurement (€3.99/unit), operational (€2.66/kg), and usable (3 kg) all reflect the extraction error, not a separate downstream transform bug.
uiVerdict.storedVsDisplaySplit: invoice_items stores unit_price=7.97 (pre-bind); detail page displays bound €3.99/unit via resolveInvoiceLinePricingPresentation
